sentiment: Some of the most beautiful things in the world have never been seen by very many people.

stories.title: Has_not_been_viewed_much
stories.summary: The Art Institute of Chicago's API includes a boolean field indicating artworks viewed fewer than 200 times since 2010 — quiet masterpieces waiting in the dark.

stories.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra will be in Codex
stories.summary: The next generation of AI models continues to embed itself deeper into the tools we use to build.

stories.title: When AI Costs More Than the Engineer
stories.summary: A look at the economics of AI spending — the inflection point where the tool costs more than the craftsperson.
